content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 26, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 26, 2026, focused on a major transition to Gemma-based model tiers across the framework, alongside significant infrastructure hardening. Key achievements include aligning training, local inference, and mobile platforms with Gemma turn-tokens, improving cloud deployment accessibility, and optimizing build pipelines through Turbo dependency consolidation.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Gemma Model Tier Transition:** Extensive updates across training, local inference, and mobile platforms to standardize on Gemma turn-tokens (`<start_of_turn>` / `<end_of_turn>`). This involved updating quantization scripts, benchmark fixtures, and native bridge prompts to replace retired Qwen-era configurations ([#9825](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9825), [#9805](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9805), [#9804](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9804), [#9796](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9796), [#9794](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9794)).
*   **Cloud Infrastructure & Deployment:** Hardened cloud sign-in flows and app deployment processes. Enabled apps-deploy for all organizations in production and fixed critical bugs preventing cloud sign-ins and agent conversation dead-ends ([#9814](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9814), [#9813](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9789), [#9771](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9771), [#9766](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9766)).
*   **Build System & CI Optimization:** Consolidated model-provider build scripts and improved Turbo dependency management to reduce redundant type-checking and build times. Enhanced CI reliability by moving CodeQL runs to robot runners and cleaning up duplicate job definitions ([#9826](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9826), [#9824](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9824), [#9823](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9823), [#9815](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9815)).
*   **Agent Framework Enhancements:** Implemented permission-aware chat document retrieval and refined desktop shell navigation, including improved gesture handling and view switching ([#9752](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9752), [#9725](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9725), [#9791](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9791)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#9820](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9820): Repair macOS window listing for computeruse.
*   [#9812](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9812): UI cleanup for the API keys page.
*   [#9806](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9806) & [#9802](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9802): CI improvements to handle stale cancelled aggregate failures.
*   [#9780](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9780): Biome formatting follow-up for web lookup actions.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No issues were explicitly closed in the provided data.*

## NEW ISSUES
*   *No new issues were opened in the provided data.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with more than 3 comments were reported for this period.*
